overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a courier character traversing a rain-soaked mountainous wasteland. The character walks through tall grass and rocky terrain past ancient stone ruins while spectral entities linger in the misty valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked grassland with scattered ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward ancient stone ruins while carrying a large backpack

entered.detail: crumbling stone walls and tower remains from ancient civilization
misty snow-capped peaks with vertical waterfalls
dense tall grass swaying in the wind and rain
ghostly white figures visible in the distant mist near the mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked grassland with ancient stone ruins scattered on the right. The character walks forward through swaying tall grass toward the misty mountains in the distance, where spectral entities are barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside ascent with stone wall remains

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to rocky gravel and stone

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky hillside path alongside crumbling stone walls

entered.detail: steep rocky outcrop forming the edge of the path
first view of the vast valley opening up below

segments.scene_description: As the character ascends the hillside, the terrain shifts from grass to rocky gravel. The ancient ruins recede into the distance on the right while a rocky cliff edge appears on the left, offering the first glimpse of the vast valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain crest with panoramic valley overlook

events.description: character reaches the crest revealing expansive valley view below

agents.ego_description: traversing the ridge crest with expansive views of the valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: vast misty valley with winding paths and scattered structures below
sharp rocky mountain peaks framing the valley

segments.scene_description: Reaching the mountain crest, the scene opens into a panoramic view of the vast valley below. The character walks along the rocky ridge with jagged peaks to the left and the misty expanse unfolding ahead, while the ancient ruins disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge traverse above valley floor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow rocky ridge path with the valley floor visible far below

entered.detail: tall thin rock formation rising from the valley floor
snake-like trail visible on the valley floor far below

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along the rocky ridge with the valley now clearly visible below. A distinctive stone spire rises in the mid-distance, and the winding paths on the valley floor become visible through the rain and mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked grassland into a panoramic mountain vista. It begins with the character walking through swaying tall grass past ancient stone ruins, moving toward misty mountains where spectral entities linger in the haze. As the character ascends the hillside, the terrain shifts from grass to rocky gravel, causing the ruins to recede while a cliff edge opens on the left to reveal the valley below. The scene then expands upon reaching the mountain crest, where the character walks along a rocky ridge with jagged peaks as the ruins disappear behind them. Finally, the camera continues along the ridge to reveal a distinctive stone spire in the mid-distance and winding paths unfolding across the valley floor through the rain and mist.
